data.body:
=== DESIGN DOC: dso-dimension-catalog-v2.md ===

# DSO review-dimension catalog v2 — LOSSLESS UNION (from-scratch re-exploration)

Built from a coverage-ledger-driven re-exploration: full file inventory (42 skills / 53 agents / 81 hook
scripts / 160 docs) → signal grep → 8 bounded extraction agents, each lossless + reconciled against v1.
**Reconciliation verdict: every v1 dimension CONFIRMED**; corrections + ~150 new dimensions/gates folded in.
Overlaps are listed separately at each source (never merged), per instruction. Citations are `file:line`
under `~/digital-service-orchestra/plugins/dso/`.

## METHODOLOGY FIX (why v1 was incomplete)
v1 chunked by a *preselected* set of locations + lossily consolidated. v2 fix: (0) coverage ledger over
EVERY file; (1) discover review surfaces by signal grep, not guess; (2) chunk by discovered set; (3) lossless
extraction; (4) reconcile — a known dimension the fresh pass can't re-find = methodology bug, not silent drop.

## CORRECTIONS APPLIED vs v1
- impl-plan Step-5b FAIL-command list = **14** not 13 (grep/find/ls/wc/cat/head/stat/test -f/test -e/[ -f/[ -e/file/du/diff).
- brainstorm SC-rule cites were **+1 off** (now :550-556). complexity-gate Gate 4 = line **62** not 61.
- red-team "8-category" = **7 interaction categories + `sc_coverage_gap`** = 8 enum values.
- `second-source-verifier` is **fail-CLOSED on absent evidence** (v1 wrongly grouped it fail-open).
- `intent-search` agent was **entirely absent** from v1 — now Part 7.
- arbiter: add **7-value `cross_cycle_pattern`** enum, **9th `none` impact_class**, **CoVe soft-cap**.
- completion-verifier `aspirational_implementation` is a **4th** `failure_category` value.
- TDD reviewer = 7 dims (confirmed); verify_command_robustness = 8 (reviewer) / 9 (gap-analysis) / 11 (task-decomposer) — three DIFFERENT lists, not one.
- DSO plan-review marker is **repo-scoped + forgeable + "passed" written even on REVISE** — anti-patterns, not to copy.

================================================================
## PART 1 — BRAINSTORM (epic spec)  [agent a95e2fdb]

### 1J Cross-epic interaction scan (Step 2.25; NEW) — cross-epic-scan.md / cross-epic-handlers.md

### 1K Step 5 prompt alignment + post-scrutiny + approval gate
LLM-instruction 4-category scan epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md:360-369 · doc-epic exclusion :372 · bot-psychologist dispatch :385-391 (17-pt taxonomy+5 RCA bot-psychologist.md:53-79) ·
FEASIBILITY_GAP handler post-scrutiny-handlers.md:14-29 · Research Findings Persistence :33-66 · SC Gap Check :70-86 · assumption premise-to-confirm :87-96 ·
approval-gate HARD-GATE preconditions approval-gate.md:3-14 · SCRUTINY emission :16-26 · provenance bold-render :62-80 · 4-option AskUserQuestion :84-128 ·
follow-on readiness follow-on-epic-gate.md:42-55 + depth cap :22-36 · value-effort scorer (Phase 3) · PIL-presence gate SKILL.md:729-739 · substitutions-prohibited :625-636 · ticket-health validate :721-727

================================================================

entry HALT gates: scrutiny:pending :79-89 / interaction:deferred :93-106 / ui_probes:deferred :109-122 / brainstorm_complete precond :125-136 ·

## PART 3 — IMPLEMENTATION-PLAN (task)  [agent a28cdc31]
================================================================
### 3A Architectural reviewers (Step 2; pass_threshold:4; only if new pattern)
Best-Practices: modern_standards best-practices.md:24 · simplicity[helper@3+] :25 · testability[≤2 mocks] :26
Project-Alignment: pattern_consistency[5 invariants: ClientFactory/SharedState/OutputProcessor/no-mid-pipeline-DB/DataService] project-alignment.md:24 · convention_compliance[4 invariants: BaseConfig/route-groups/stdlib-pref/no-autouse-DB] :25
Justification: divergence_justified[name-alt + concrete-limitation + measurable-advantage] justification.md:24
### 3B Plan committee — 5 reviewers, pass_threshold:5 (ALL=5), 18 dims (review-criteria.md:11-13)
Task-Design: atomicity[3 gates] task-design.md:23 · acceptance_criteria :24 · verify_command_robustness[8 classes, never-null] :25,64
TDD(7): tdd_discipline :80 · test_isolation :81 · red_green_sequence :82 · test_boundary_coverage :83 · red_test_dependency :84 · exemption_justification :85 · bidirectional_test_coverage :86 (+instr-file adj :68-74; score-floor rules)
Safety: incremental_deploy safety.md:24 · backward_compat[expand-contract] :25
Dependencies: dag_validity dependencies.md:23 · no_coupling :24
Completeness: criteria_coverage completeness.md:23 · e2e_coverage[null-rule] :24 · ac_semantic_consistency :25 · dd_collective_ac_coverage[never-null, 5-step audit] :26-36
conflict patterns(6): expand_vs_reduce/more_vs_less/strict_vs_flexible/add_vs_remove/boundary_vs_coverage/red_green_vs_atomicity review-criteria.md:67-74
### 3C Proposal gen (approach-proposer) — distinctness 4 axes(data-layer/control-flow/dep-graph/interface-boundary) SKILL.md:374-377 · complexity-gate G1-3 per proposal approach-proposer.md:97-103 · min-3 :370 · 6 schema fields+risk proposal-schema.md:47-74 · fitness-fn baseline :117-125 · error envelopes (model_requirement_unmet/insufficient_solution_space)
### 3D Approach-decision-maker (opus) — 5 dims: Codebase-Alignment :49 · Blast-Radius[file/layer bands] :63 · Testability :77 · Simplicity[anchored-on-gates] :89 · Robustness :101 · context-hierarchy disqualifiers (epic-SC non-negotiable/story-DD required/considerations advisory) :33-43 · 7 anti-patterns (golden-hammer/premature-abstraction/cargo-cult/resume-driven/premature-optimization/NIH/config-surface-proliferation) :115-127
### 3E Gap-analysis (Step 6, opus, COMPLEX only) — race :27 · state/file-conflict :34 · implicit-assumption :42 · missing-error/rollback :50 · cross-task-interference :59 · AC-verify-defects[9 classes] :67-78
### 3F Step-1 scans + thresholds — ambiguity 6-signal :290-297 · unsatisfiable-SC 3-check⇒REPLAN_ESCALATE :301-308 · doc-only skip 3-signal :359-362 · cross-cutting ≥3 layers OR ≥5 interfaces :334-342 · testing-mode RED/GREEN/UPDATE + 4 test-class :719-740 · Step-5b behavioral cross-check (per-DD PASS/FAIL, 14 FAIL-cmds) :1312-1332
### 3G task-decomposer — 3-gate granularity :131-135 · verify-cmd robustness[11-item] :174-188 · DD partition invariant :121-127 · ## Story DD Coverage header gate :442
### 3H complexity-evaluator (haiku, agents/complexity-evaluator.md) — 8 dims: Files :80 · Layers :90 · Interfaces[≥1⇒COMPLEX] :103 · scope_certainty[type-forked; Low⇒COMPLEX] :112-154 · Confidence[Med⇒COMPLEX] :156 · Blast-Radius[complex_override] :165 · Pattern-Familiarity :176 · External-Boundary-Count :186 · promotion rules :200-206 · epic-only overrides[multi-persona/UI+backend/migration/foundation-enhancement/external-integration/>6SC + done-def + single-concern] :224-253 · manifest_depth :210-220 · feasibility_review_recommended :257-264 · tier_schema arg :13-20
### 3H' DEPRECATED twin shared/prompts/complexity-evaluator.md — 5-dim (no 6/7/8, no epic overrides), but is the ONLY home of per-caller Context-Specific Routing table (sprint→COMPLEX, debug-everything→TRIVIAL, preplanning tier→mode, fix-bug→epic) :114-126

================================================================
## PART 4 — COHERENCE-WALK + PLAN-REVIEW  [agent a0b0aae8]
================================================================
### 4A coherence-walk shared rubric (verdict-rubric.md) — **3-valued PASS/AMBIGUOUS/FAIL** :19-48 ·
severity critical(runtime-wrong)/important(real-gap)/minor(doc-drift) :51-53 ·
**ANTI-FP DISCIPLINES**: single-question scoping :7-16 · cite-or-omit ("findings w/o evidence = change-detector noise → FPs that block legit migrations") :61-63 · refuse-to-invent/no-speculation (missing file=citable absence) :65-67 ·
AMBIGUOUS = de-escalation target ("prefer AMBIGUOUS+question over FAIL+hand-wave") · JSON-only output contract :55-59 · tech_failure (orchestrator-only, ≠FAIL) :57 · 3 worked examples :69-130
### 4B chunks A-F (each conjunction; reviews SC-vs-Closure-Check per stage) — A brainstorm :24-30 · B preplanning :20-26 · C impl-plan :20-26 · D sprint[6 clauses: parent_id-only walk, closed/deleted skip, BLOCK-vs-WARN] :20-30 · E commit-review :26-32 · F operational-dry-run[classifier yield/mis-class/≥50%-uncertain; data-citation convention] :33-43
### 4C plan-review rubric (plan-review-dispatch.md) — Feasibility :12-16 · Completeness :18-22 · YAGNI/Overengineering[+config-surface check] :24-29 · Codebase-Alignment :31-35 · "find real problems not nitpicks" :2 · VERDICT PASS/REVISE, severity critical/MAJOR/minor
### 4D plan-review SKILL+agent — PASS=all4≥4 SKILL.md:74,79 · artifact_type→model(design→opus/impl→sonnet) :38-54 · schema-validation loop-until-valid :58-70 · severity-ordered 1-pass remediation :80-86 · marker plan-review-status :88-106 · SUB-AGENT-GUARD :7-9 · explicit non-features :108-114

================================================================
## PART 5 — REVIEW HARNESS (two systems)  [agent aaa5d470]
================================================================
### 5A System A code-review base (reviewer-base.md) — inherited by all 10 code-reviewers
**ANTI-FP SPINE**: precision-over-quantity (zero findings is success) :29-33 · linter/test-gate exclusion :36-62 · diff-boundary CI :67-72 ·
**Verify-Before-Assert 7 sub-rules** (no critical/important on unverified out-of-diff facts) :74-99 · caller-input verification gate :249-252 · arithmetic verification gate :254 ·
**cite_lines + cited_excerpt ≥5 chars verbatim** ("quote actual code or don't emit") :228-235 · verification_evidence on absence-claims :237 · reachability ≥20 chars (caller→harm) :239-242 ·
severity calibration (MINOR floor list; important≠critical; unverified⇒not-critical) :289-351 · test-coupling Four-Criterion Test (suggestion/minor ceiling) :304-327 · 7 "looks-alarming-but-fine" carve-outs :329-339 ·
NOT-Flag auto-downgrade (7 categories→minor cap) :355-388 · behavioral-testing 7 VALID patterns :392-431 · 2 pre-output mechanical gates :472-508 · approach_viability_concern :276 · cycle≥2 auto-downgrade :466-468
findings schema: severity critical/important/minor/fragile(+suggestion auto-only) · category correctness/design/hygiene/maintainability/verification (hard-rejected if invented) · output 3-line envelope (REVIEWER_HASH/FINDING_COUNT/FILES) :11-25
### 5B deltas — tier identity/model/scope-isolation (deep specialists own ONE category) + tier-specific severity (security-blue-team Dismiss/Downgrade/Sustain; performance "breaks→critical/scales→important"; test-quality source-grep&tautology=always-critical, NOT-flag-doesn't-apply)
### 5C findings-schema contract (review-findings-schema.md) — relation enum NEW_INTRODUCED/NEW_PRE_EXISTING/RESUSTAIN_OF/REFRAME_OF :162-165 · auto-downgrade (NEW_PRE_EXISTING⇒minor) :188-221 · defended-finding suppression (±5-line proximity→suggestion) + novelty gate :181-182 · empty-findings attestation :131 · absence-claim anchors (soft/hard) :376-412 · Call-2 completeness (anti-silent-drop) :252-268
### 5D escalation (escalate-review-signal.md) — severity-uncertainty→route-higher-tier; fail-open on malformed; oscillation_no_arbiter_engagement tier-upgrade
### 5E **VERDICT / ABSTENTION CONTRACTS (the verdict-model answer)**
review-tristate-lattice.md: **PASS/FAIL/INDETERMINATE(+PRECONDITION_NOT_MET)** :22-27 — FAIL is safe bottom (never retried/downgraded) · indistinguishable→FAIL · never-PASS-on-inferred-benign · INDETERMINATE self-heals ONLY on observable-transient, never→PASS :30-56 ·
verifier-verdict.md: typed **P1 PASS/FAIL/BLOCKED/INCONCLUSIVE/EVIDENCE_PENDING** · unrecognized→BLOCKED · prose-never-gates :32-88 ·
confidence-signal.md: binary CONFIDENT/UNCERTAIN abstention · fail-safe default UNCERTAIN · asymmetric cost (false-UNCERTAIN cheap / false-CONFIDENT catastrophic) · accumulate at durable unit (2→pause) :139 ·
confidence-context.md: high/medium/low, fail-safe-low, monotone-elevate-never-lower
### 5F System B /dso:review-protocol (REVIEW-PROTOCOL-WORKFLOW.md) — 1-5 scores, pass_threshold 4, **caller-computes-pass never-trust-status** :136-143 · conflict only-when-both-critical/major · severity critical/MAJOR/minor · REVIEWER-FILE-CHECKLIST verbatim 1-5 scale + "two reviewers within 1 point"
### 5G overlay calibration (overlay-calibration-baselines.md) — **empirical self-calibration**: measure own downstream dismissal rate; >50% dismissed=over-triggering, 30%=well-calibrated, <5%=patterns-miss; critical never auto-assigned by pattern-match

================================================================
## PART 6 — GATE/HOOK ENFORCEMENT LAYER  [agent aceebf0a]
================================================================
**Gate-tier doctrine**: `DSO-GATE-TIER: A` = enforcement/fail-CLOSED; soft hooks fail-OPEN via ERR-trap. enforcement-gate.sh ci-pr kill-switch :38-54
- **plan-review-gate.sh** (PreToolUse ExitPlanMode): marker exists + first-line==passed; exit 2 block; **FAILS OPEN** (non-repo/ERR-trap); no force-flag; bypass=run skill. ANTI-PATTERNS: repo-scoped (deps.sh:265), forgeable (integrity-guard exempts it), "passed" written even on REVISE.
- **pre-commit-review-gate.sh** [TIER A, the fail-CLOSED model]: diff_hash recompute+verify (state-binding), allowlist short-circuit, self-heal on formatting-only drift, **fails CLOSED** incl hash-compute-failure→GATE_UNAVAILABLE+exit 2
- **gate-unavailable.sh bypass envelope**: `DSO_GATE_BYPASS_<NAME>=1` + **mandatory `_REASON`** (flag-without-reason rejected), name-validated, JSONL-audited; Tier-A blocks-on-unavailable unless bypass active
- **write→guard→verify anti-fabrication chain**: write-reviewer-findings.sh (validate-then-write, only success yields hash) → review-integrity-guard.sh (blocks `> review-status` writes; exempts plan-review-status) → record-review.sh (verifies hash, **derives status from severity**, binds diff_hash)
- **review-stop-check.sh** = SOFT advisory (never blocks) — the advisory-tier model
- **preconditions-validator-lib.sh** = stage-ENTRY gate (`_dso_pv_entry_check`: upstream PRECONDITIONS event must exist+pass minimal schema); fail-open-by-convention (`|| true`); inference_review rate_high_stakes≥100 floor
- **brainstorm-gate** (pre-enterplanmode): sentinel + skill-allowlist bypass model

================================================================
## PART 7 — CLOSE-GATE + FAIL-ROUTING (our mirror)  [agent af5aae96]
================================================================
### 7A completion-verifier (agents/completion-verifier.md) — "did we build what spec says?" (NOT correctness)
per-criterion observable(needs exec trace; inspection⇒FAIL) vs documented(Grep/Read OK) :212-216 ·
**aspirational-implementation 5-signal detector (any 2⇒FAIL)**: RED-stubs / no-live-path-callers / competing-impl / future-tense-docs / missing-integration-artifacts :238-245 ·
descendant walk parent_id-ONLY, skip closed/deleted, blocked=open-unless-terminal, open-descendant Closure-Checks **BLOCK-vs-WARN** :160-203 ·
failure_category: external_blocker/internal_architecture_gap/evidence_pending(+aspirational_implementation) :218-221,245 ·
**P1 enum PASS/FAIL/BLOCKED/INCONCLUSIVE + EVIDENCE_PENDING** :523,566 · execution-trace authority table (FAIL trace=definitive, no inspection override) :120-141 · story-verdict-trust (don't re-verify passed child) :249-257 ·
manual sentinel :327-344 · trailer-provenance :346-390 · deferred-evidence obligations (regex) :424-470 · consumer smoke tests (dynamic discovery) :392-422 · **narrative template-rendered, no LLM prose** :489-499 · bypass-log-check⇒FAIL :501-508 ·
project closure gates SC9(coverage,only-one-that-fails)/SC14(FP<10%,informational)/SC13(restart,informational) :259-326
### 7B verification-remediation-planner (FAIL→action) — **mandatory Scope Pre-Classification** (IN-STORY/NEW-IN-EPIC/CROSS-EPIC/AMBIGUOUS) — discriminator is SCOPE not evidence-quantity :43-52 ·
Rule1 replan_story(in-story zero-evidence→preplanning) :54 · Rule2 new_tasks_in_story(all-partial impl-only→planner_supplied; implement_feature vs legitimize_marker) :64-90 · Rule3 new_story_in_epic(→preplanning) :92 · Rule4 replan_epic(cross-epic→brainstorm) :105 · PROTOCOL_ERROR fallthrough :113 · tiebreakers T1(R2>R3)/T2(LOW) :121-134 · confidence HIGH/MED/LOW(LOW⇒human pause)
### 7C remediation-loop-protocol — 4 termination tokens (REPLAN_ESCALATE/HALT_FOR_USER/OSCILLATION_HALT/PROTOCOL_ERROR) :24-49 · per-cycle declaration · oscillation-check hard-gate cycle≥2 (OSCILLATION_CHECK_SKIPPED escape) :52-66 · REPLAN_ESCALATE IFF cycle==MAX && findings≠empty; success-on-empty-at-max(no token) :70-82 · DELTA OUTPUT template :86-159 · MAX_CYCLES default 3 min 2 reject-not-clamp :177-193
### 7D scope-drift-reviewer (fix-bug) — PARSED_SCOPE checkpoint :32-47 · behavioral-vs-non-behavioral table :66-78 · in_scope/ambiguous/out_of_scope :92-97 · **Creation-vs-Restoration** (CREATION=scope-expansion→out_of_scope; signals: gh-issue-create/gh-api-POST/requests.post/curl-X-POST, new CLI, new user-visible artifacts) :99-113
### 7E intent-search (fix-bug Intent Gate; was ABSENT from v1) — 4 outcomes intent-aligned/contradicting/ambiguous/conflict :122-144 · 7 classification rules · Step-7b caller traversal (behavioral_dependency vs incidental_usage; TRAVERSAL_CHECKPOINT; 3-level cap) :146-179
### 7F second-source-verifier (**fail-CLOSED on absence**) — verifier_used/renderer_used/gate_enforced 3 booleans → PASS iff all-true :53-99
### 7G code-reviewer-arbiter — BLOCK/DEFER/DROP (AND-logic: severity∈{crit,imp} + defense-rejected + cycle≤max + impact_class≠none) :40-48 · CoVe soft-cap (cycle>max⇒DEFER-all) :50-53 · cross_reviewer_agreement(4)/cross_cycle_pattern(7)/impact_class(8-floor+none=9) :106-137

================================================================
## PART 8 — OTHER PLANNING/QUALITY SKILLS  [agent a615e022]
================================================================
- **design-review** (6 reviewers/21 dims, min-score gate, pass≥4): North-Star(user_archetype_fit/anti_pattern_free/design_system_compliance/scope_fit/future_readiness) · Usability-HCD(user_feedback/interaction_quality/accessibility/content_clarity) · Visual(visual_hierarchy/intentional_layout/fidelity_balance) · Component-Reuse(library_first/portability/trope_vs_useful/removal_impact) · Form-Input(minimal_input/validation_guidance/review_before_submit) · Tech-Compliance(stack_correct/architecture_consistent)
- **ui-designer** (5 reviewers/21 dims, pass≥4, arbitration): PM(story_alignment/user_value/scope_appropriateness/consistency/epic_coherence/anti_pattern_compliance) · DSL(component_reuse/visual_hierarchy_intent/design_system_compliance/new_component_justification/cross_story_consistency) · A11y(wcag_compliance/keyboard_navigation/screen_reader_support/inclusive_design/hcd_heuristics) · Frontend(implementation_feasibility/performance/state_complexity/specification_clarity) · Visual-Spatial(visual_hierarchy_legibility,pixel-observable) · arbitration tie-break rules (legibility>intent on pixels; intent>legibility on intent; 3-2 majority; 2-2→needs-revision) arbitration.md
- **retro** (5 reviewers/17 dims, pass≥4): Test-Quality(assertion_coverage/mock_discipline/naming_clarity/determinism/risk_coverage) · Documentation(freshness/completeness/navigability) · Code-Quality(file_size>500/complexity/duplication/dead_code) · Naming(consistency) · Architecture(layering/separation/error_resilience/observability) + friction thresholds + shift-left CI gate + bug-class thresholds
- **roadmap**: 3 milestone reviewers (agent-clarity/scope/value, shared) + **Value/Effort 1-5 + P0-P4 quadrant** SKILL.md:147-189 + Critical-Enabler override + **Agent Alignment Test** (readiness gate: "could a dev agent build from description alone w/ no context? AC testable? deps documented?") :221-226 + ticket-health<5 gate
- **prioritize-epics**: bucket-classification (north-star/optional/oos/needs-review) + risk-flag criteria + P0-P4 mapping + high/low-value rubric + enabler-inheritance + epic-clarity gate (value/who/where, NOT spec)
- **validate-work** (5-domain **PASS/WARN/FAIL** gate matrix, detect-only): local/CI/issue-health/staging-deploy/staging-test + batch gating
- **verification-before-completion**: binary evidence Gate Function + **claim→proving-command table** (Requires vs Not-Sufficient) :27-35 + red-flags ("should/probably/seems")
- **oscillation-check**: binary CLEAR/OSCILLATION (revert-direction=oscillation, build-on=clear) + max-iteration safety bounds per caller
- **remediate-arch-evidence**: 6 audit probes (self-use/workflow-trigger/state-lifecycle/bypass-governance/spec-phase-coverage[**zero-children rule**]/external-outcome) NO_FLAG/FLAG + in-session-verifiability master gate + complete/partial disposition
- **architect-foundation**: AP-1..5 coded fitness-function gates (binary executable assertions) + "inert-until-wired" completion gate
- **interface-contracts**: binary completion checklist + create-decision gate
- **NO eval content**: dryrun (pure orchestration), design-wireframe (empty stub)
Cross-skill DUP dims (preserved separately): scope_fit/scope_appropriateness/scope ×3 · design_system_compliance ×2 · anti_pattern_free≈anti_pattern_compliance · library_first≈component_reuse · design-review accessibility(1) = ui-designer A11y(4 split)

================================================================
## PART 9 — SYNTHESIS FOR OUR REBAR GATE (design-critical distillation)
================================================================
1. **VERDICT MODEL** — adopt the tri-state lattice: PASS / FAIL / **INDETERMINATE(abstain)**, FAIL is the safe bottom (never auto-clears), INDETERMINATE never silently→PASS, "couldn't evaluate"→fail-closed (Tier-A). Typed verdict authoritative; **prose never gates**. (review-tristate-lattice + verifier-verdict + confidence-signal)
2. **BLOCK vs ADVISE** — DSO's answer: typed multi-state where unsafe direction (silent pass) is structurally impossible + abstention first-class + asymmetric cost. Sound/mechanical checks block hard; LLM-judgment uncertainty → INDETERMINATE (surface, fail-closed-but-overridable).
3. **OVERRIDE** — paired-env bypass envelope: flag + **mandatory reason**, audited (gate-unavailable.sh). Our `--force`+justification, validated.
4. **STATE-BINDING** — diff_hash recompute+verify (pre-commit-review-gate). Our material-event-commit binding, validated. AVOID DSO plan-marker anti-patterns (repo-scoped, forgeable, passed-on-REVISE).
5. **ANTI-FP (low-false-positive Sonnet review)** — cite-or-omit + verbatim excerpt ≥N chars, refuse-to-invent, single-question scoping, precision-over-quantity, severity-MINOR-floor + NOT-flag auto-downgrade, reachability gate, empirical self-calibration (measure own dismissal rate). (reviewer-base + verdict-rubric)
6. **FAIL→ACTION** — two layers: failure_category (why) + scope-pre-classification (where: in-story/new-in-epic/cross-epic) → replan-story / add-tasks / new-child / replan-epic. Discriminator = SCOPE, not evidence-quantity. Our has_children pivot ≈ DSO's scope membership.
7. **ASPIRATIONAL-PLAN detector** (invert completion-verifier's 5 signals): RED-stub-only / no-consumer / competing-path / future-tense / no-wiring.
8. **READINESS analog** — roadmap "Agent Alignment Test" + brainstorm Understanding-Gate Completeness Attestation + preplanning entry HALT gates = the closest existing "can this start?" gates.
9. **ANTI-FABRICATION** — write→guard→verify chain + derive-pass-from-severity (not free text); applies to making our signed attestation un-forgeable.
10. **CONVERGENCE** — remediation-loop-protocol (MAX_CYCLES, oscillation hard-gate, terminal tokens) for the plan→review→fix loop.

================================================================
## PART 10 — RESEARCH ADDENDUM (GitHub prior-art + LLM-planning failure modes)
================================================================
### 10A Verdict-composition VERDICT — adopt (C)-from-(A), REJECT (B)
- (A) block-on-sound / advise-on-judgment is the SAFE FLOOR (LLM-Modulo 2402.01817: LLM=generator, hard critics MUST be sound, soft/style MAY be LLM but never own accept).
- (C) promote a judgment dim to block-with-override ONLY if tool-checkable OR measured <~10% effective-FP on our own traffic; else it just reconstructs (B).
- (B) block-by-default-on-judgment + routine override → REJECTED. Static-analysis abandonment thresholds: >30% FP → tool ignored (Coverity CACM 2010), Google Tricorder enables only <10% effective-FP, build-breakers ~0% (CACM 2018). An LLM-judgment gate at its measured FP is 8-80× past abandonment → disabled/rubber-stamped/routed-around, taking sound checks with it. Override-as-normal-path = worse than no gate for trust.
- Make advisory findings GENERATIVE (feed a revise-the-plan loop, LLM-Modulo back-prompt), not silent logs.
### 10B Three-valued verdict — KEEP, but tighten
- AMBIGUOUS = **abstain-and-ESCALATE** (to stronger judge / human), NOT a terminal "advisory/overridable" (corrects synthesis note #1).
- Abstain TRIGGER must be a CALIBRATED error-ranking signal (multi-sample agreement / self-consistency / ensemble), validated on labeled data — NOT raw/verbalized judge confidence (AUROC ~0.55). Lead cite: Trust-or-Escalate (ICLR 2025 Oral, 2407.18370); theory Chow 1970 / Geifman-El-Yaniv 1705.08500. Sobriety: AbstentionBench 2506.09038 (abstention unsolved; reasoning-FT degrades it).
### 10C CORRECTION — Kambhampati ~84% is false-ACCEPTANCE, not over-blocking
2310.08118: GPT-4 self-verify wrongly ACCEPTED 38/45 invalid Blocksworld plans (84.45% false-accept); false-REJECT only 1.8%. 2402.08115: verifier error asymmetric by domain (FP-dominated Blocksworld 18.6% vs FN-catastrophic Mystery 97%). ⇒ LLM gate is simultaneously too-lenient AND too-strict, unpredictably — strengthens anti-(B) in BOTH directions. (Earlier chat framing of 84% as "blocks legit work" was wrong; the cite-or-omit quote in Part 4A is DSO's own coherence-walk context and stands.)
### 10D NINE uncovered failure modes → checks to ADD
U1 (HIGH) nonexistent package/slopsquatting (19.7% don't exist, 2406.10279) → extend **B1** to check registry+lockfile, not just in-repo symbols.
U2 (HIGH) fault-localization (wrong file/function target; #1 SWE-bench failure) → new leaf check: plan's named target plausibly contains the implied code.
U3 test-gaming/test-deletion/reward-hacking intent (SWE-Bench+ 2410.06992) → scan plan for test-keyed special-casing / proposals to weaken the AC-defining test (**L3** covers RED→GREEN presence, not gaming).
U4 irreversible/destructive action w/o checkpoint → make **O4** destructive sniff ALWAYS-ON vs irreversible-action allowlist.
U5 (HIGH) missing verification/termination criteria (MAST ~21-23%) → each risky step has a following verify/checkpoint + explicit stop condition (broader than TDD-shaped L3).
U6 (HIGH) self-review AS the verification mechanism → flag plans whose only verification is self-review vs sound oracle (2310.01798, 2402.08115).
U7 under-scoped/multi-file blindness → broaden **L2** beyond rename-centric to "edit-set matches issue-implied scope" via call-graph.
U8 premise-endorsement sycophancy (2310.13548) → narrow add to **B4**: flag plan that builds on a ticket premise the codebase CONTRADICTS w/o verification.
U9 long-plan context degradation (lost-in-the-middle 2307.03172) → cheap structural flag: plan/context token count + constraints-not-at-edges.
Not statically catchable (gate blind spots, pair w/ runtime guardrails): plan-vs-execution drift, step repetition / reasoning-action mismatch (MAST's two largest), multi-turn sycophancy, reward-hacking acts.
### 10E Cost / shift-left
- Do NOT justify on the phase-cost curve (1:10:100 is folklore — Menzies 1609.04886 found no delayed-issue effect in iterative workflows). Justify on base-rate × P(catch) × escape-cost vs run-cost + FP-cost.
- Architecture: deterministic prefilter (≈free) → cheap LLM (Haiku ~$0.005) on residual → escalate to Opus (~$0.025) only on low confidence; cost × RESIDUAL fraction not total volume; prompt-cache + Batch API.
- **Condition the gate on difficulty/uncertainty, don't fire flat** (Snell 2408.03314: >4× more efficient). Ground verifier in SOUND external signal (codebase, test/type-check, verify-commands, file-impact), not introspection. **Run heavy review ASYNC off the critical path; `claim` = fast signed-attestation check** (already specced — the latency tax lands once, async, not per pickup).
- Citation hygiene: "23-min interruption recovery" NOT from Gloria Mark — don't cite; "context rot" is a single vendor report — cite peer-reviewed backbone instead.
